title: Minimum rights of employees - language translations | Employment New Zealand
content:
## Minimum rights of employees - language translations
Information on your employment rights and responsibilities is available in a range of languages.
- Quick guide: Know your employment rights
- Migrant exploitation
- Mediation quick guide
- Family violence leave guide

## Quick guide: Know your employment rights
An overview of your key minimum employee rights.
- English - Know your employment rights (PDF, 1 MB)
- Māori - Me mōhio ki ō mōtika mahi (PDF, 292 KB)
- Chinese Simplified -了解您的就业权利 (PDF, 375 KB)
- Hindi - रोजगार से जुड़े अपने अधिकारों को जान (PDF, 345 KB)
- Samoan - Malamalama i ou aiatatau (PDF, 292 KB)
- Spanish - Conozca sus derechos laborales (PDF, 296 KB)
- Tagalog - Alamin ang iyong mga karapatan sa trabaho (PDF, 294 KB)
- Tongan - ‘Ilo‘i ho‘o ngaahi totonu fakangāué (PDF, 294 KB)

## Migrant exploitation
Migrant workers have the same minimum employment rights as New Zealand workers:
Migrant exploitation

## Mediation quick guide
An overview of the employment mediation process and what to expect.
- English - Quick guide to employment mediation (PDF, 1.1 MB)
- Māori - He aratohu poto ki te takawaenga raruraru mahi (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Chinese Simplified - 就业调解快速指南 (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Hindi - रोज़गार मध्यस्थता के लिए त्वरित मार्गदर्शिका (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Samoan - Alafua mo faatofāla'iga i galuega (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Tagalog - Mabilis na gabay sa pagpamagitan sa trabaho (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Tongan - Fakahinohino ki hono fai 'o ha Feinga Fakalelei (mediation) 'i he ngaahi ngāue'angá (PDF, 1 MB)

## Family violence leave guide
Note: Translated guides are being updated.
People affected by family violence have legal protections at work.
- English - Rights for employees affected by family violence (PDF, 1.1 MB)
- Maori - Ngā motika mō ngā kaimahi i pākia e te whakarekereke ā-whare (PDF, 906 KB)
- Arabic - حقوق الموظفي ن المتأثرين بالعنف الم ن ز ي ل (PDF, 950 KB)
- Chinese - 受家庭暴力影响的雇员的权利 (PDF, 1021 KB)
- Farsi - حقوق برای کارمندا ن کە تحت تاث ی خشونت خان گ  قرار گرفتند (PDF, 944 KB)
- Hindi - घरेल ू हिसं ा स े प्रभावित करच्म ारियों के अधिकार (PDF, 998 KB)
- Korean - 가정폭력으로 피해를 입은 근로자의 권리 (PDF, 957 KB)
- Punjabi - ਘਰੇਲੂ ਹਿੰਸਾ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਵਿਤ ਕਰਮਚਾਰੀਆਂ ਲਈ ਅਧਿਕਾਰ (PDF, 933 KB)
- Tongan - Ko e ngaahi totonu ‘a e kakai ngāue ‘oku uesia kinautolu ‘i ha fevākovi‘aki ‘i ho nau ‘api nofo‘anga pe nofo ‘a kāinga (PDF, 906 KB)
- Samoan - Āiā tatau mo tagata faigaluega e a‘afia i sauaga fa‘ale‘āiga (PDF, 903 KB)
